title: Old New Combat
description: [BETA] Bringing Minecraft's abandoned Combat Tests to mod loaders.
body:
Old New Combat
==============

A mod that ports Minecraft's abandoned [Combat Tests][1] as a mod for 1.16 and 1.18.

###  A note on "Beta"

Mod is marked as "Beta" because not all features are implemented yet. However, I consider the mod to be stable, and even play on a personal modpack with this mod, not once having an error or crash. Once all features are finished, I will release version 1.0.0 and mark it as stable.

## Current Features

For a comprehensive list of changes, see the [Combat Tests][1] wiki page. Some features are not yet implemented (see the GitHub page for a list). Some notable changes:

- Items now have an Attack Reach attribute. **Currently only implemented on Forge.**
- Attack Damage and Attack Speed has been tweaked for all weapons
- Axes always disable shields, new "Cleaving" enchantment increases stun duration. No more durability penalty.
- Bow accuracy increased, however decreases the longer you hold it (Animation temporarily disabled)
- Natural regeneration doesn't get a boost from saturation, however regenerates twice as fast and until 7 hunger instead of 18. Also causes less exhaustion.
- Shields only block up to 5 damage. However, they block all non-player explosion (e.g. Creepers)
- Shields only block damage in a 100-degree arc, instead of a full 180 degrees.
- Potions stack to 16, snowballs to 64.
- Potions and milk buckets consume twice as fast.

[1]: https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Java_Edition_Combat_Tests
